commit.message:
Fix report card: fill full page and restore double border

- Add display:flex + flex-direction:column to .print-report so the card is a flex column
- Add margin-top:auto to .print-signatures to push signature to the bottom of the A4 page, filling the blank lower portion
- Restore border:6px double #071c3a in @media print (was overridden to none)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Ispravi ReferenceError: msgLower mora biti definiran PRIJE gastro pre-gen bloka

msgLower korišten u gastro pre-gen (linija ~360) ali definiran tek u okolica bloku
(linija ~461) — temporal dead zone → ReferenceError → JSON parse error u frontendu.

Fix: premjesti 'const msgLower = message.toLowerCase()' na sam početak
pre-gen sekcije (prije dogadanja bloka), ukloni duplu definiciju u okolica bloku.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Supervisor Sprint 4 — API integration, Bloom's tagging, accessibility, data retention, docs

- Add 8 new API client functions (highlights, predictions, COPPA, rephrase)
- Add credentials: 'include' for httpOnly cookie auth
- Async Bloom's cognitive tagging on session complete (fire-and-forget)
- tagCognitiveData + mapDepthToBloom + thinking momentum update
- 90-day data retention migration (COPPA: redact dialogue content)
- WCAG accessibility fixes across 4 components:
  - BookCard: keyboard-accessible, WCAG AA contrast colors
  - StageProgress: progressbar role, aria-labels
  - AchievementUnlock: Escape key, focus management, reduced-motion
  - NavBar: skip link, mobile touch targets, semantic nav
- README v2.0 with Sprint 1-3 features and score roadmap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix navigation from Astro landing pages to React app

Issue 1 - Skip React landing page for users from Astro pages:
- Added query parameter detection (?from=landing-page)
- Automatically marks landing page and install prompt as shown
- New users go straight to profile setup
- Cleans up URL after detection

Issue 2 - Prevent dashboard errors for existing users:
- Added redirect check for /protein-tracker and /macro-tracker routes
- When existing users navigate to these static pages, redirect to full page load
- Prevents React SPA state initialization issues

Updated all CTA links in both Astro pages:
- /protein-tracker: 2 CTAs now use /?from=landing-page
- /macro-tracker: 2 CTAs now use /?from=landing-page

This fixes the onboarding flow and prevents dashboard loading errors.

Initial commit: Agent research project

- Add supply chain agent implementation with LangGraph
- Include demand forecast, inventory, logistics, and supplier evaluation agents
- Add project documentation and prompts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix blank hero on reload: cap introGate wait to 600ms

On reload (no loader), GSAP sets hero-headline to opacity:0 immediately,
but introGate was blocked by heroMediaGate (5s timeout) and homeContentGate
(Sanity, potentially slow). The hero stayed invisible for seconds.
Now resolveIntroGate fires within 600ms max on all no-loader paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: chat delivery, match_start yourSide, chess move format

- Exclude joining player from system chat broadcast so subsequent
  chat messages aren't shadowed by the buffered join notification
- Send per-player match_start with yourSide field so clients know
  which side they're playing (was missing, causing engine AI tests
  to fail since human never sent first move)
- Normalize chess string UCI moves ("e2e4") to { uci: "e2e4" } in
  the move handler for client compatibility
- Fix xiangqi test coordinates: red's cannon is at row 2, not row 7

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Ispravi 3 buga: slike caffe barova (placeholder), gastro filter, smještaj showAll SLIKE CAFFE BAROVA — konačni ispravak: - Problem: combo regex (telefoni 04/NNNN) korumpirao URL unutar [[IMG:...]] markera čak i NAKON pomicanja - jer regex radi na tekstu koji sadrži marker - Fix: [[IMG:url]] → privremeni \x02IMG_N\x03 placeholder PRIJE combo regexpa Combo regex ne može pogoditi placeholder, URL ostaje netaknut Nakon combo regexpa: placeholder → GASTRO FILTER — "Gdje ručati" prikazuje samo restorane: - Dodaj wantsDining detekciju: 'ručati','ručak','večerati','večera','jesti'... - Dodaj wantsCafe detekciju: 'kafić','kava','caffe','bar'... - Restorani + brza hrana: prikazuju se kad wantsDining ili opći upit - Caffe barovi: prikazuju se samo kad wantsCafe ili opći upit - Uvod tekst prilagođen namjeri upita SMJEŠTAJ SHOWALL — prikaži sve objekte: - Ukloni && !wantsSobe isključenja iz wantsHotel i wantsApartman - Uvedi typeCount: broj traženih tipova smještaja u upitu - showAll = typeCount === 0 || typeCount >= 2 - Query "Hoteli, apartmani, sobe" → typeCount=3 → showAll=true → svi objekti Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6

Fix i18n language detection and blank page on reload

- Remove navigator.language detection: always default to FR unless user has set a preference in localStorage. Prevents English browsers from forcing EN on the site.
- Add 4s timeout on Sanity homeContentGate when loader is skipped (reload), preventing the hero from staying invisible indefinitely if Sanity is slow or CORS-blocked.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Astro landing pages for protein and macro tracker SEO

Created two SEO-optimized static landing pages:

Protein Tracker (/protein-tracker):

Macro Tracker (/macro-tracker):

Both pages:

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v7: ADC noise filtering, gpio_reset_pin scan, boot beep

- Add ADC range filter [1000-1750 mV] in readBatRaw() to reject USB/charger
  noise spikes (~3 mV, ~839 mV) while accepting valid battery readings (~1319 mV)
- Return last-known-good value when all 32 samples are out of range (EMA frozen)
- Add g_valid_count global; Serial DBG now prints valid:XX/32 noise quality metric
- Call gpio_reset_pin() before each boot scan pin to release BSP-configured state
- Add 100 ms boot beep to confirm BUZ_PIN=21 drives the physical buzzer
- Update BAT_PIN comment with v6 scan data; correct battery state (~3.43 V typical)
- Include driver/gpio.h for gpio_reset_pin()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove hardcoded default: "80" from port questions in 34 packages

The system uses randomized ports, so hardcoding port 80 as the default
breaks that behavior. This was inadvertently added in 92e0304.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix 14 bugs: crash, deadlocks, data corruption, and UI issues

Critical fixes:
- auth_service: Restore Dict import removed during cleanup (NameError)
- auth_service: Don't double-wrap AuthenticationError on sign-in failure
- tab_automation: Guard loop.close() against UnboundLocalError
- certifiedcredit: Pass display_name as JS arg instead of f-string
  interpolation to prevent breakage on names with quotes
- partnerscredit: Fix wrong key 'match' -> 'suggested_role' so AI
  role matching actually works instead of always defaulting

Important fixes:
- keyvault_service: Add reset() method so singleton can be
  re-initialized with fresh credentials after sign-out/sign-in
- tab_automation: Replace blocking Event.wait(300) with async polling
  in 7 conflict dialog callbacks (only CertifiedCredit had the fix)
- bankvod: Set success=False in except block so password update
  failures don't report as successful
- certifiedcredit: Check final _save_user result instead of assuming
  restrictions save always succeeds
- dataverify: Return error when Create A New User button click fails
  instead of silently continuing to 'success'
- mmi: Close browser in finally block to prevent process leaks
- tab_automation: Reset automation_summary in clear()
- tab_summary: Unpack buttons before re-packing to prevent duplicates
- main_window: Destroy window after showing config error dialog

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: split nav backdrop + content into separate DOM siblings to fix iOS blur

Previous approach (backdrop as child div) still caused iOS WebKit to promote
the parent to a compositing layer, leaking blur onto icon rendering.
Separate sibling elements share no compositing context — blur cannot bleed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix dividend fetch: directly call Yahoo Finance API from Cloud Function

- Replace yahoo-finance2.historical() with direct fetch() to Yahoo Finance v8 chart API
- Server-side fetch has no CORS restriction, much more reliable
- Gets both dividends and capitalGains events (covers ETF distributions like TSLL)

- Strip trailing 4-digit year from exam_name in session badge so it shows "ANNUAL EXAMINATION · SESSION : 2025-26" instead of "ANNUAL EXAMINATION 2026 · SESSION : 2025-26"
- Remove watermark logo (print-watermark img block)
- Split signature designation into 3 lines: (Atul Ch. Nath) / Headmaster, Phulani High / School

commit.message:
fix: serialize bson.Decimal128 from MongoDB before JSON response

MongoDB pairs_stats returns Decimal128 types that Pydantic/FastAPI
cannot serialize, causing 500 on /api/analysis/{id}/report endpoint.
Added _sanitize_bson() to recursively convert BSON types to JSON-safe
Python primitives (Decimal128→float, ObjectId→str, datetime→isoformat).

- Add Google Fonts preconnect hints to all 11 templates for faster font loading
- Convert report_card.html @import fonts to <link> tags (eliminates serial CSS-blocking font fetch)

commit.message:
Update CLAUDE.md and README.md to reflect cleanup changes

- CLAUDE.md: Update vendor.py description (now just VendorConfig),
  document KeyVaultService credential requirement (no fallback),
  note singleton pattern used by vendor modules
- README.md: Add missing utils/screenshot.py to project structure,
  fix screenshot path (was "working directory", now %LOCALAPPDATA%),
  update vendor.py description

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(skills): use find -exec in context commands for missing file resilience (#919)

Context commands with hardcoded filenames (package.json, pyproject.toml)
write to stderr and fail when files don't exist, breaking execution in
projects that lack those files (e.g., ESP32 projects).

Replaced with find -exec pattern that only operates on files that
actually exist. Added regression check to lint-context-commands.sh.

Affected skills: blueprint-curate-docs, configure-feature-flags,
configure-api-tests, configure-integration-tests, test-focus, api-tests.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: bookings test race condition with exact timestamp

Use a date 1 minute in the future instead of Date.now() to avoid
millisecond race between test setup and function execution.

Remove dead Azure credential fallback from KeyVaultService

The AzureCliCredential and DefaultAzureCredential fallback branch was
never reached in production - credential is always provided via
MSALCredentialAdapter from the GUI sign-in flow. Replace with an
explicit error if credential is missing, and remove the azure.identity
import entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix A2, A3_4, and A5 vertical positioning to match manufacturer reference

A2 and A3_4 meshes were too high because visual_xyz adjustments were far
too conservative relative to their proximal bore depths (~32mm and ~40mm).
A5 and A6 were then floating above A3_4 because only visual_xyz was used
(which doesn't move the COR). Fixed by:

- A2 visual_xyz Z: -0.015 → -0.030 (flush with shoulder)
- A3_4 visual_xyz Z: -0.003 → -0.038 (flush with elbow)
- joint_4 origin Z: 0.076 → 0.038 (moves COR + A5/A6 down with chain)
- Removed A5 visual_xyz (COR shift handles positioning)
- Updated verify_kinematics.py expected positions for joint_4/5/6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Hide 'Storehouse' business name in receipts when not set

**Problem:**
- Receipts showed "📍 Storehouse" for users without a business name
- This confused customers who thought they were buying from Storehouse
- Made receipts look unprofessional with fake business name

**Solution (Option 1 - Hide Business Name):**
- Only show business name line if user has set a custom business name
- If businessName is empty or 'Storehouse', hide the entire line
- "Powered by Storehouse" footer still provides attribution
- Cleaner,  more professional receipt for users without business names

**Benefits:**
✅ No customer confusion about who they're buying from
✅ Professional receipts without placeholder text
✅ "Powered by Storehouse" at bottom provides branding
✅ Users with custom business names still see their name prominently

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: tieba 百度安全验证静默失败 → 改为抛异常触发熔断

- client.py: 安全验证页不再返回空列表，改为抛 Exception
- worker.py: 捕获百度安全验证异常返回 blocked（触发熔断），
  而不是 failed（重试 3 次浪费资源）

根因：安全验证返回空列表 → search() break → worker 认为 success
→ total_crawled=0 但不触发熔断 → 后续任务继续白跑

Auto-fetch dividend history from Yahoo Finance

Add autoFetchDividends() that fetches 10-year dividend history via
Firebase Functions (primary) → CORS proxy with events=div param (fallback).
Deduplicates by symbol+date. Manual entry kept as secondary option.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Reduce Realtime db_pool from 20 to 5 for managed Postgres

With max_connections=50 on DO managed Postgres, db_pool=20 per tenant
risks exhausting connections (2 tenants × 20 = 40 slots). Reducing to 5
prevents DatabaseConnectionRateLimitReached errors while providing
sufficient headroom for CDC multiplexing with single-channel subscriptions.

- Updated wrappers.py sequence() accessor for new structure

Fix homepage mobile sub-panel structure: wrap form inside panel, restore title

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix receipt modal and WhatsApp issues

**Issues Fixed:**
1. Receipt modal not appearing immediately after sale
   - Added showingReceiptRef to prevent React state batching race condition
   - Ref is set synchronously before state updates
   - useEffect checks ref first to prevent premature state reset

2. WhatsApp showing only phone number without receipt text
   - Fixed import to use whatsapp.ts instead of whatsapp.js
   - Old whatsapp.js had wrong function signature (message, context)
   - New whatsapp.ts has correct signature (phone, message)
   - Added comprehensive error handling and logging

3. Syntax error preventing compilation
   - Removed duplicate closing parenthesis on line 1297
   - Line 869 opened conditional {isOpen && (
   - Line 1296 closed it properly )}
   - Line 1297 had extra )} that was breaking JSX

**Technical Details:**
- RecordSaleModalV2.tsx:110 - Added showingReceiptRef
- RecordSaleModalV2.tsx:246 - Modified useEffect to check ref first
- RecordSaleModalV2.tsx:799 - Set ref before state
- RecordSaleModalV2.tsx:1307 - Clear ref when closing
- ReceiptOptionsModal.tsx:3 - Fixed import path to whatsapp.ts
- ReceiptOptionsModal.tsx:74-113 - Enhanced error handling

**Result:**
✅ Receipt modal appears immediately after completing sale
✅ WhatsApp opens with full receipt text (292 characters)
✅ No page reload or navigation issues
✅ User can share receipt multiple times

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
